component.name: Agent Studio Open
component.summary: Local-first IDE for debugging MCP and A2A agents

description.p: Agent Studio Open records, replays, compares, and regression-tests MCP and A2A agent sessions locally.
Trace data stays on the user's machine by default. Telemetry and crash reporting are opt-in only.
Staged Proofline UI/UX package metadata. No Linux artifact is published or verified.
Initial historical release metadata for Agent Studio Open distribution.
